title: memecylon minimifolium
intro: Memecylon minimifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In herbal preparations, Memecylon minimifolium is often made into a decoction or infused in hot water to be consumed, or used as a topical application to promote wound healing.
